title: Festivals & events
subtitle: 41 celebrations through the year — pick a day to see what's on.

festivals.name: New Year's Day
festivals.description: Federal public holiday marking the start of the new year with celebrations across the nation.

festivals.name: Winter Carnival
festivals.description: Quebec City's famous winter festival featuring ice sculptures, snow slides, and winter sports celebrated across New England traditions.

festivals.name: Sundance Film Festival
festivals.description: Premier independent film festival showcasing innovative cinema from around the world and launching careers of emerging filmmakers.

festivals.name: Martin Luther King Jr. Day
festivals.description: Federal holiday honoring the civil rights leader with parades, speeches, and community service across the nation.

festivals.name: Groundhog Day
festivals.description: Quirky annual tradition where a groundhog's emergence predicts six more weeks of winter or early spring.

festivals.name: Presidents' Day
festivals.description: Federal holiday honoring U.S. presidents with sales and special events across the nation.

festivals.name: Mardi Gras
festivals.description: New Orleans' world-famous carnival celebration featuring parades, floats, music, and mask-wearing traditions rooted in French Catholic culture.

festivals.name: South by Southwest (SXSW)
festivals.description: Massive multi-day film, interactive media, and music festival attracting thousands of artists and industry professionals.

festivals.name: Holi Festival of Colors
festivals.description: Hindu spring festival celebrating love and new beginnings with colorful powder throws and cultural performances across U.S. communities.

festivals.name: St. Patrick's Day
festivals.description: Celebration of Irish heritage with parades, green attire, and festive gatherings throughout American cities.

festivals.name: Easter
festivals.description: Christian holiday celebrated with egg hunts, family gatherings, and religious services across the nation.

festivals.name: Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival
festivals.description: Iconic desert music festival featuring top international artists, art installations, and fashion-forward attendees.

festivals.name: Cherry Blossom Festival
festivals.description: Washington D.C.'s celebration of Japanese cherry blossoms with parades, performances, and cultural exhibitions.

festivals.name: Cinco de Mayo
festivals.description: Celebration of Mexican heritage and the Battle of Puebla with parades, food, music, and cultural events.

festivals.name: Kentucky Derby Festival
festivals.description: Two-week celebration of thoroughbred horse racing featuring the world-famous Kentucky Derby race and festive events.

festivals.name: Memorial Day
festivals.description: Federal holiday honoring deceased military members with parades, ceremonies, and flag tributes nationwide.

festivals.name: Governors Ball Music Festival
festivals.description: Premier New York City music festival held on Randall's Island featuring diverse genres and top-tier artists.

festivals.name: Juneteenth
festivals.description: Federal holiday commemorating the emancipation of enslaved African Americans celebrated with parades and cultural events.

festivals.name: Pride Month
festivals.description: Celebration of LGBTQ+ identity and history with parades, festivals, and community events across American cities.

festivals.name: Bonnaroo Music Festival
festivals.description: Multi-day music festival in Tennessee featuring diverse genres, art installations, and camping experiences.

festivals.name: Independence Day
festivals.description: Federal holiday celebrating American independence with fireworks, parades, picnics, and patriotic events nationwide.

festivals.name: Telluride Bluegrass Festival
festivals.description: Premier bluegrass music festival in the Colorado mountains featuring world-class musicians and outdoor performances.

festivals.name: Summerfest
festivals.description: World's largest music festival held on Milwaukee's lakefront featuring hundreds of performances across 11 days.

festivals.name: Burning Man
festivals.description: Iconic week-long event in the Nevada desert celebrating art, self-expression, and community with elaborate installations and performances.

festivals.name: Sturgis Motorcycle Rally
festivals.description: World's largest motorcycle rally attracting hundreds of thousands of riders for ten days of events and celebrations.

festivals.name: Texas Book Festival
festivals.description: Major book festival in Austin featuring author readings, panel discussions, and celebrations of literature.

festivals.name: New York Film Festival
festivals.description: Prestigious international film festival showcasing documentaries, experimental films, and works from acclaimed directors.

festivals.name: Labor Day
festivals.description: Federal holiday honoring American workers with parades and celebrations; marks unofficial end of summer.

festivals.name: Oktoberfest
festivals.description: Bavarian beer and cultural festival celebrated with traditional food, music, and craft beers.

festivals.name: Rosh Hashanah
festivals.description: Jewish New Year observed with family gatherings, prayer services, and traditional foods across Jewish communities.

festivals.name: Burning Man Arts Festival
festivals.description: Transformative week-long gathering in the desert celebrating radical self-expression, art, and community values.

festivals.name: Pumpkin Festival
festivals.description: Autumn celebration featuring giant pumpkins, pumpkin foods, live entertainment, and fall harvest traditions.

festivals.name: Austin City Limits Music Festival
festivals.description: Major two-day music festival in Zilker Park featuring top artists across rock, pop, hip-hop, and indie genres.

festivals.name: Día de Muertos
festivals.description: Mexican Day of the Dead celebration honoring deceased loved ones with altars, marigolds, sugar skulls, and processions.

festivals.name: Halloween
festivals.description: Annual celebration featuring costume parades, haunted attractions, trick-or-treating, and festive parties nationwide.

festivals.name: Thanksgiving
festivals.description: Federal holiday celebrated nationwide with family gatherings, traditional turkey dinners, and expressions of gratitude.

festivals.name: Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade
festivals.description: Iconic New York City parade featuring giant character balloons, floats, marching bands, and celebrity performances.

festivals.name: Hanukkah
festivals.description: Jewish Festival of Lights celebrated with menorah lighting, gift-giving, and traditional foods over eight days.

festivals.name: Festival of Lights
festivals.description: Spectacular holiday light display featuring millions of lights, decorations, and festive attractions.

festivals.name: Christmas
festivals.description: Federal holiday celebrating the birth of Jesus Christ with family gatherings, gift exchanges, and festive traditions nationwide.

festivals.name: New Year's Eve
festivals.description: Celebration marking the final day of the year with parties, countdowns, and fireworks across the nation.
